PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='pythonw.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "app\\.py" -and $_.CommandLine -match "AV Bible" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -Confirm:$false; "Stopped old app \(PID $\($_.ProcessId\)\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\pythonw.exe" -ArgumentList "app.py" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\dmwhi\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Claude Code\\AV Bible"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='pythonw.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "app\\.py" }; if \($p\) { "New app running \(PID $\($p.ProcessId -join ', '\)\)" } else { "App did not stay running" })
